prompt: Edit image 1: Introduce the curious dog from image 2 peeking near the laptop. Replace the screen content on the tablet and laptop with a colorful, simple computer graphic drawing in the style seen on the screen in image 3, reflecting a creative task.
prompt_refined:
Edit image 1:
Introduce the curious, brown, shaggy dog from image 2, positioned on the table to the left of the laptop, with its head peeking up as if observing the screens.
Replace the content on both the tablet and laptop screens with a colorful, simple computer graphic drawing. This drawing should be in the distinct, naive style seen on the screen in image 3, reflecting a creative artistic task.
objects: curious, brown, shaggy dog on the table to the left of the laptop
dog's head peeking up as if observing the screens
colorful, simple computer graphic drawing on the tablet screen
colorful, simple computer graphic drawing on the laptop screen
